title: Logotype
summary: The most distinct part of our visual identity is the SEB emblem. It telegraphically communicates and connects SEB to a piece of communication, a building, a service, or a digital product.

columns.title: Usage
columns.content:
The SEB emblem can be used in white or black.

We use the version that creates the highest contrast for increased legibility in both digital and physical environments and makes sure that the brand is presented as clearly as possible.

If you have any questions or need assistance, please contact [creativedirection@seb.se](mailto:creativedirection@seb.se)

sections.title: Good examples
sections.section-content: Here follows a few good examples of how to place the logotype and when to use which version of it.
